reviews.comment:
Buena atención de los playeros, pero al igual que las otras estaciones de servicio, suelen haber muchos autos por lo que es eecomendable ir con tiempo y relajado

(Translated by Google)
The attendants are friendly, but like the other gas stations, there are usually a lot of cars, so it's advisable to go with plenty of time and be relaxed.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURRbzhMc1hREAE

reviews.comment:
Lindo lugar para hacer una pausa, los Finde largos no la recomiendo para recargar combustible, busquen cargar en otra cuidad por que se tarda mucho en está . Los baños limpios y el parque de estacionamiento amplio.

(Translated by Google)
Nice place to stop for a break. I don't recommend refueling here on long weekends; look for another city to fill up because it takes a long time. The restrooms are clean and the parking lot is spacious.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRak55a3V3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo único que se puede hacer que valga la pena es cargar combustible, lo demás es una mugre y caro

(Translated by Google)
The only worthwhile thing to do is fill up with fuel; everything else is rubbish and expensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NC1xdVNnEAE

reviews.comment:
De 6 surtidores funcionan solo 2. 20 coches de cola en cada surtidor y los playeros boludean. Una lastima en una esfacion de servicio del ACA

(Translated by Google)
Of the 6 pumps, only 2 are working. There are 20 cars queuing at each pump, and the attendants are just messing around. A real shame at an ACA service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNBNWM2Snl3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy bueno. Cómo todos los ACA del pais. Excelente atención y colaboración prestada cordialmente por parte del equipo de trabajo. Los baños son muy limpios.y ordenados y los chicos del centro de compras. Son muy amables. El combustible es el mejor. Cómo siempre.

(Translated by Google)
Very good. Like all ACA stations in the country. Excellent service and friendly assistance from the staff. The restrooms are very clean and tidy, and the staff at the shopping center are very kind. The fuel is the best, as always.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/4946581049957260491/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnNXY3YXFnRRAB
